Plugin.Name: Traefik Label Manager
Plugin.Overview: View and edit Traefik Docker labels for every Unraid container under Settings and Network Services. Configure Traefik v2 or v3 with the standalone Docker provider, exposedByDefault=false, useBindPortIP=true, and appropriately secured Docker API access. Choose a domain suffix in the plugin and point its wildcard at Traefik in your DNS server. Enable a route from a container's Add/Update form, or compare and edit saved versus active labels on the settings page. Save Template is non-disruptive; Apply & Restart recreates the container through Unraid so label changes become active. Entrypoints, HTTPS, certificates, DNS, Traefik, and container lifecycle policy remain user-managed.
